name: Tama Kanzashi - Round Ball Hair Pin
name_ja: 玉かんざし
best_for: Kimono styling, updo hairstyles, formal events
expert_note: The quintessential Japanese hair ornament. A single tama kanzashi transforms any updo into a statement.

name: Hana Kanzashi - Flower Hair Ornament
name_ja: 花かんざし
best_for: Wedding ceremonies, coming-of-age day, special occasions
expert_note: Tsumami zaiku technique folds tiny silk squares into petals. Maiko apprentices wear elaborate hana kanzashi that change monthly with the seasons.

name: Bira-Bira Kanzashi - Dangling Hair Pin
name_ja: びらびらかんざし
best_for: Formal kimono occasions, dance performances, celebrations
expert_note: The dangling metal strips create a subtle chiming sound with movement. Originally worn by young unmarried women in the Edo period.

name: Tsuge Boxwood Comb - Fine Tooth
name_ja: つげ櫛
best_for: Daily hair care, reducing frizz, fine to medium hair
expert_note: Tsuge combs are soaked in camellia oil for months before carving. A well-maintained one lasts generations and develops a beautiful amber patina.

name: Tsuge Boxwood Comb - Wide Tooth
name_ja: つげ櫛 荒歯
pros: Gentle on thick or curly hair
best_for: Thick hair detangling, wet hair combing, curly hair care
expert_note: Wide-tooth tsuge combs are the go-to for thick or curly hair. The wide spacing prevents breakage while the oil-infused wood smooths cuticles.

name: Kogai Hair Stick - Lacquer
name_ja: 笄
best_for: Simple updos, bun styling, formal and casual wear
expert_note: The kogai is the Swiss army knife of Japanese hair accessories. One stick can create a dozen different updo styles.

name: Acetate Claw Clip - Tortoiseshell
name_ja: バンスクリップ べっ甲柄
best_for: Quick updos, office wear, casual outings
expert_note: Japanese acetate clips use thicker material than most imports. The tortoiseshell pattern varies piece to piece since the acetate sheets are handmade.

name: Acetate Claw Clip - Marble
name_ja: バンスクリップ マーブル
best_for: Thick hair, half-up styles, everyday wear
expert_note: Japanese-made acetate clips are polished by hand to remove sharp edges. The marble pattern means no two clips are identical.

name: Silk Scrunchie - Solid Color
name_ja: シルクシュシュ 無地
best_for: Sleeping, daily ponytails, protecting delicate hair
expert_note: Made from Tango chirimen silk, traditionally used for kimono. The crepe texture grips hair without pulling.

name: Silk Scrunchie - Kimono Print
name_ja: シルクシュシュ 和柄
best_for: Casual kimono wear, yukata styling, Japanese fashion
expert_note: These scrunchies are made from leftover kimono fabric bolts. Each pattern has cultural significance tied to seasons and wishes.

name: Minimalist Metal Barrette - Gold
name_ja: メタルバレッタ ゴールド
best_for: Fine hair, minimalist styling, office looks
expert_note: Japanese metal barrettes use a snap-lock mechanism that holds fine hair without slipping. Look for the matte gold finish for a more understated look.

name: Minimalist Metal Barrette - Silver
name_ja: メタルバレッタ シルバー
best_for: Fine to medium hair, professional settings, layered looks
expert_note: Pair two or three along a side part for a modern Japanese editorial look.

name: Fabric Kanzashi - Cherry Blossom
name_ja: つまみ細工かんざし 桜
best_for: Hanami parties, spring festivals, yukata styling
expert_note: Cherry blossom kanzashi are traditionally worn from late March through April. The pink and white color palette pairs with almost any outfit.

name: Fabric Kanzashi - Chrysanthemum
name_ja: つまみ細工かんざし 菊
best_for: Autumn festivals, formal occasions, kimono pairing
expert_note: Chrysanthemum represents longevity and rejuvenation in Japanese culture. Traditionally worn in September and October.

name: Velvet Headband - Wide
name_ja: ベルベットカチューシャ ワイド
best_for: Short to medium hair, face-framing, bad hair days
expert_note: Japanese velvet headbands use wider elastic at the back for comfort. The padding distributes pressure so you can wear it all day.

name: Satin Ribbon Headband
name_ja: サテンリボンカチューシャ
best_for: Formal events, photo shoots, preppy styling
expert_note: Satin headbands are having a major moment in Japanese street fashion. The thin profile works with any hair length.

name: Spiral Hair Tie Set
name_ja: スプリングヘアゴム セット
best_for: Gym, swimming, everyday ponytails, all hair types
expert_note: The spiral design was popularized in Japan before going global. Japanese versions use higher-quality resin that does not stretch out as quickly.

name: Chirimen Fabric Hair Tie
name_ja: ちりめんヘアゴム
best_for: Casual kimono styling, yukata, Japanese fashion outfits
expert_note: Chirimen is a traditional Japanese crepe fabric with a distinctive pebbled texture. These ties add a subtle Japanese touch to any ponytail.

name: Resin Hair Claw - Clear
name_ja: 樹脂ヘアクロー クリア
best_for: Work settings, medium hair, discrete styling
expert_note: Clear resin clips are a staple in Japanese offices. They hold hair neatly without drawing attention.

name: Lacquer Hair Stick - Vermillion
name_ja: 漆塗り髪留め 朱
best_for: Formal kimono, tea ceremony, collector pieces
expert_note: Wajima lacquerware uses over 120 production steps. The vermillion color comes from natural urushi lacquer mixed with cinnabar.

name: Lacquer Hair Stick - Black and Gold
name_ja: 漆塗り髪留め 黒金蒔絵
best_for: Wedding ceremonies, formal events, art collectors
expert_note: Maki-e is the art of sprinkling gold powder onto wet lacquer. Each design is applied freehand by a trained artisan.

name: Yukata Hair Clip Set
name_ja: 浴衣ヘアクリップ セット
best_for: Summer festivals, yukata styling, casual parties
expert_note: These clip sets are designed to be scattered through a loose updo. Mix and match positions for a carefree festival look.

name: Acetate Banana Clip - Amber
name_ja: バナナクリップ アンバー
best_for: Thick or long hair, quick styling, office wear
expert_note: Banana clips made a comeback in Japanese fashion around 2023. The curved design distributes weight evenly so they stay put in thick hair.

name: Tsuge Comb - Decorative Carved
name_ja: つげ櫛 彫刻入り
best_for: Display, gifts, formal hair styling, kimono accessories
expert_note: Decorative tsuge combs were historically given as wedding gifts. The carvings often depict seasonal flowers or auspicious motifs.

name: Metal Kanzashi - Crane Motif
name_ja: 金属かんざし 鶴
best_for: Wedding ceremonies, New Year celebrations, formal events
expert_note: Cranes mate for life in Japanese symbolism, making crane-motif kanzashi a traditional wedding accessory.

name: Pearl Hair Pin Set
name_ja: パールヘアピン セット
best_for: Bridal hair, formal updos, fine hair decoration
expert_note: Scatter these along a braid or cluster them above one ear for a modern take on traditional pearl ornamentation.

name: Kanoko Shibori Hair Tie
name_ja: 鹿の子絞りヘアゴム
best_for: Kimono coordination, maiko-inspired styling, gifts
expert_note: Kanoko shibori is a labor-intensive tie-dye technique from Kyoto. Each dot is individually tied and dyed by hand.

name: Wooden Hair Fork - Cherry Wood
name_ja: 木製ヘアフォーク 桜材
best_for: Bun styling, French twists, bohemian looks
expert_note: Cherry wood hair forks are lighter than boxwood but equally smooth. The warm reddish tone deepens with use.

name: Scrunchie - Organic Cotton
name_ja: シュシュ オーガニックコットン
best_for: Sensitive skin, everyday wear, children
expert_note: Made with Imabari towel-grade organic cotton. The same softness standards that made Imabari towels famous worldwide.

name: Resin Kanzashi - Modern Floral
name_ja: レジンかんざし モダンフラワー
best_for: Casual outfits, first kanzashi purchase, daily wear
expert_note: Resin kanzashi bring traditional designs into everyday wear. More durable than silk versions and easier to maintain.

name: Twisted Metal Headband - Rose Gold
name_ja: ツイストメタルカチューシャ ローズゴールド
pros: Rose gold complements all skin tones
best_for: Formal events, date nights, photo shoots
expert_note: The twisted design adds visual interest without overwhelming. Rose gold is the most popular headband finish in Japanese department stores.

name: Fabric Kanzashi - Plum Blossom
name_ja: つまみ細工かんざし 梅
best_for: New Year celebrations, early spring events, kimono styling
expert_note: Plum blossoms bloom in February while snow still covers the ground. They symbolize perseverance and renewal in Japanese culture.
